fields.title: UCM Field Type Showcase
fields.description:
This demo entry exercises every UCM field type.
Use it as a reference when building new content models or verifying CMS adapter behaviour.

body.content:
Welcome to the UCM Demo

This page demonstrates every field type supported by the Unified Content Model. Each tab in the CMS editor maps to a group of fields defined in demo.schema.json.

Why a demo page?

Having a single entry that covers all field types makes it easy to:

  • Verify adapter mappings after changes
  • Test round-trip pull/push across platforms
  • Onboard new developers with a concrete example

fields.readme:
# UCM Demo Entry

This is a **markdown** field rendered by the `markdown` type.

## Supported syntax

- **Bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~
- [Links](https://example.com)
- `inline code` and fenced blocks

```js
console.log('Hello from UCM');
```
bulletPoints: Covers every primitive type (string, number, boolean, date)
Includes media, references, and rich text
Demonstrates select, radio, checkbox, and slider widgets
Shows geopoint, color, and object fields
